# backgroundColor

**Instance Property**

The background color of the section content when created from an Apple Print Product.

## Declaration

```swift
var backgroundColor: NSColor? { get }
```

## Discussion

This property has no meaning outside of Apple Print Products.

## Determining Content Properties

- **elements**: An array of asset, text, or journal entry elements contained in the content.
- **numberOfColumns**: The number of columns if section content is displayed in a grid layout.
- **aspectRatio**: The aspect ratio of the full content layout, defined as width over height.
- **cloudAssetIdentifiers**: An array containing all cloud asset identifiers referenced in the content.
